comment: "One of the most engaging aspects of the Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa Surgery course was the detailed focus on anaesthesia technique specific to this challenging surgical area. The content effectively highlighted the unique physiological and anatomical considerations. These elements combined to provide a clear, evidence-based understanding of how anaesthesia in this region must be tailored to minimize complications and support optimal surgical outcomes."
"This course is most interesting for its clinical practice at any hospital/surgical institute. It's helpful from the theocratical point of view. It's concise and well summarized."
